prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on TEMPO (2,2,6,6-tetramethylpiperidine-1-oxyl) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2 (open-shell UKS). Geometry: user-supplied .xyz at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz; single-point calculation (no re-optimization). Density fitting was NOT used (exact four-center integrals). SCF converged in 12 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity: status ok, trustworthy true.

Headline result: HOMO–LUMO gap = 3.8724203 eV.

HOMO (index 86) = −6.3375439 eV
LUMO (index 87) = −2.4651235 eV
HOMO–LUMO gap = 3.8724203 eV
Total energy = −483.88366 Hartree (−13167.145 eV)

Koopmans-theorem descriptors:
  Vertical IP = 6.3375439 eV
  Vertical EA = 2.4651235 eV
  Electronegativity = 4.4013337 eV
  Chemical hardness = 1.9362102 eV
  Chemical softness = 0.51647286 eV⁻¹
  Electrophilicity index = 5.0024886 eV

Method: DFT (UKS), B3LYP/def2-TZVP, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2. Software: PySCF. No warnings. Clean convergence.
